community_notes.excerpt: Advanced Edition leader summary lists Starfish as 6 health, 3 move, 3x4 damage, damaging diagonally and pushing orthogonally.
The daily discussion records Starfish Leader at 6 HP, move 3, damage 3, with an effect that damages four oblique tiles and pushes four others.
Fandom lists Starfish Leader as a 6 HP, 3 move boss with Scored Appendages: 3 damage to four corner/diagonal tiles and outward push on four adjacent tiles.
